description_long: This figure represents an adult human wearing a hooded sweatshirt with the hood up, obscuring most of the head and face except for a stylized, toothy mouth. The clothing is form-fitting, including a hoodie with drawstrings, long pants, and gloves, all appearing as a single, continuous material. The figure's stance is upright and symmetrical, with arms slightly bent at the elbows and hands relaxed. The shoes are robust and match the rest of the outfit, giving the appearance of boots. The overall design is stylized and minimalistic, with no visible skin or hair, and the entire surface is uniformly colored.
description: A stylized adult figure in a hooded sweatshirt, pants, gloves, and boots, with a toothy mouth visible under the hood. The entire figure is uniformly colored and has a minimalistic, smooth appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the hooded head, toothy mouth, drawstrings, and full frontal details of the clothing and boots.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the hood, nose, mouth, and the continuous flow of the outfit from head to boots.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the hood, shoulders, and the seamless back of the clothing, with no facial features visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the hood, mouth, and the side contour of the outfit.
attribute_clothing_type: hooded sweatshirt, fitted pants, gloves, and boots
